name: [PDF] Investigating Limit Order Book Characteristics for Short Term Price
snippet:
In this paper, we employ a machine learning approach to investigate Limit Order Book features and their potential to predict short term price movements.
With the proliferation of algorithmic high-frequency trading in financial markets, the Limit Order Book has generated increased research interest.
